name: International Turkey Sandwich
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the lettuce, tomato, scallions, and green pepper in a large bowl.
2. Pour on the Italian dressing and toss well to combine all ingredients.
3. Arrange 2 ounces of turkey and 1 ounce of cheese on each muffin half.
4. Broil for 2-3 minutes until heated through.
5. Spoon 1/4 of the salad onto each open-faced sandwich.
